summary: AI-Powered Lead Scoring module with multi-LLM provider support. Well-structured with thorough documentation and tests, but core enrichment logic is stubbed and API keys are stored in plaintext, limiting production readiness.

checklist.findings: All manifest fields valid. Version 19.0.1.0.0, depends on base/crm/mail, LGPL-3 license, all referenced data files exist.
Standard Odoo 19 directory layout with models/, views/, security/, data/, wizards/, tests/, static/. sgc_ prefix ensures uniqueness.
API keys stored in plaintext Char field (no encryption). _enrich_lead() is a stub that sets status to completed without actual work. llm.service model is minimal.
checklist.recommendation: Use fields.Binary with encryption for API keys. Implement actual LLM integration in _enrich_lead(). Enrich llm.service with meaningful fields.

checklist.findings: Multi-company record rule present. ACL entries defined for all models. CRITICAL: API keys stored in plaintext with no encryption or password masking.
checklist.recommendation: Implement encryption for API key storage using odoo.tools.crypt. Use password widget for API key field. Consider Odoo's built-in encrypted fields pattern.

checklist.findings: Clean inheritance of crm form, tree, kanban views. AI Scoring tab with progressbar/gauge widgets. Batch actions for enrichment and report regeneration.
checklist.recommendation: Minor: Add tooltips or help text to gauge widget. Consider UX polish for empty states.

checklist.findings: Demo provider records for 7 LLM providers (inactive by default). Cron job defined with 50-lead batch limit. Proper noupdate='1' usage.
3 test files with mock-based LLM API tests, provider validation tests, and lead scoring algorithm tests. Tests use proper setUp/tearDown with mocks.
checklist.recommendation: Increase test coverage for edge cases (empty leads, failed API calls). Add integration tests.

checklist.findings: Comprehensive README with badges, module info table, architecture section. Separate API, Google Search, and Quick Start guides. Detailed CHANGELOG with version history.
Clean imports and error handling. Extra scripts in module root (test_groq_api.py, quick_install.py, emergency_security_fix.py) indicate development artifacts. Stub methods marked as placeholders.
checklist.recommendation: Move utility scripts outside module or remove before distribution. Implement or document stubbed methods. Remove emergency fix scripts from production module.

checklist.findings: Proper use of models.TransientModel, api.depends, api.onchange decorators. fields.Datetime.now() used. XML syntax follows Odoo 19 standards.
Only requests as external Python dependency. DB indexes on ai_enrichment_status, ai_last_enrichment_date, auto_enrich fields. Cron batch limited to 50 leads.
checklist.recommendation: Consider adding rate limiting for external API calls. Add index on ai_probability_score if used for sorting/filtering.

security_issues.description: API keys stored in plaintext in llm.provider.api_key field
Emergency fix scripts included in module distribution

stub_methods: _enrich_lead() - no actual LLM integration (sets completed without work)
WebResearchService.search_google_custom() - requires external Google API setup
strengths: Excellent documentation with multiple guides and detailed changelog
Well-tested with mock-based test suite covering 3 test files
Multi-company security implemented via record rules
Clean UI integration with Odoo-native patterns (progressbar, gauge, kanban badges)
Batch enrichment wizard with user notifications
